name: Sites conformes
description: Basic installation of the sites-conformes app

ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: List of allowed host names, separated by commas (domain names only)

DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL.description: The default email address for sending transactional emails. Leave empty to disable emails entirely.

EMAIL_HOST.description: The email address for sending transactional emails

EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD.description: The email password for sending transactional emails

EMAIL_HOST_USER.description: The email user for sending transactional emails

EMAIL_PORT.description: The email port for sending transactional emails

EMAIL_TIMEOUT.description: The email timeout for sending transactional emails

WAGTAIL_PASSWORD_RESET_ENABLED.description: Allows the 'Reset password' form on the login page. Only set to true if actual email settings have been set

S3_HOST.description: The host of the S3 bucket (ex: s3.eu-west-par.io.cloud.ovh.net)

S3_KEY_ID.description: The access key of the S3 bucket

S3_KEY_SECRET.description: The secret key of the S3 bucket

S3_BUCKET_NAME.description: The name of the S3 bucket used to store user-imported medias.

S3_BUCKET_REGION.description: The region of the S3 bucket (ex: eu-west-par)

S3_LOCATION.description: The base path for user imported medias in the S3 bucket

SF_USE_DB_STORAGE.description: Store the files in database instead of S3. Not recommanded for high trafic sites
